message:
test(web): add OperatorsClient component tests

Tests the operators page UI:
- Basic rendering (title, stats, operator cards)
- Category filtering (pill buttons, filtered results)
- Search filtering (input, clear, no results state)
- Operator selection for prompt builder
- Empty state handling

Uses mock operator data matching BrennerOperatorPaletteEntry structure.
